Class Commitment

java.lang.Object
com.primust.core.Commitment
public final class Commitment extends Object
Commitment layer for Primust policy engine adapters.

PRIVACY INVARIANT: Raw content NEVER leaves the customer environment. Only the commitment hash transits to Primust API.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class
    Description

    Commitment.CommitmentResult
    Result of a commitment computation.

  • Method Details

    • resolveAlgorithm

      public static String resolveAlgorithm()
      Resolve the commitment algorithm from env var or default. Default is "sha256". Poseidon2 is opt-in via PRIMUST_COMMITMENT_ALGORITHM=poseidon2 until an audited implementation (e.g. Barretenberg) is validated.

    • commit

      public static Commitment.CommitmentResult commit(byte[] data, String algorithm)
      Compute a commitment hash over input bytes.
      Parameters:
      data - raw content bytes (NEVER transmitted)
      algorithm - "sha256" (default) or "poseidon2"

    • commit

      public static Commitment.CommitmentResult commit(byte[] data)
      Commit with resolved algorithm (env var or sha256 default).

    • commitOutput

      public static Commitment.CommitmentResult commitOutput(byte[] data)
      Commitment for check output. Uses resolved algorithm.

    • buildCommitmentRoot

      public static String buildCommitmentRoot(List<String> hashes)
      Build a Merkle root over an array of commitment hashes. Uses the resolved algorithm (SHA-256 default, Poseidon2 opt-in) for intermediate nodes.
      Returns:
      Merkle root, or null for empty array. Single hash returns unchanged.

    • buildCommitmentRoot

      public static String buildCommitmentRoot(List<String> hashes, String algorithm)
      Build a Merkle root with an explicit algorithm for intermediate nodes.
